Sage Bot Item Code: A105


Other locations the gear can be found
Donkey
Static Surprise

Triggers: Once in a while

Every second, lightning strikes a random enemy near the artifact wearer for 5 sec. Lightning deals damage to the target equal to 8% of their max health and has a 25% chance to electrify them. Each time the electrified unit uses an ability, they are stunned for 1 sec. Lasts for 5 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
